description_long: This is a large, rectangular awning structure attached to a building, featuring a prominent terracotta-tiled roof and multiple covered outdoor seating areas. The front facade is defined by two wide, black awnings extending over a patio with planters and railings, providing shade and shelter for patrons. The side view reveals a beige wall with a single door and additional awning coverage, while the rear view shows a simpler facade with two smaller awnings and a central blue door or window. The structure is supported by a combination of fixed frames and posts, with visible metal trusses and beams supporting the awning canopies. The overall design suggests a commercial or hospitality use, such as a café or restaurant, with attention to both function and aesthetic detail. Decorative plants and railings enhance the welcoming atmosphere of the outdoor spaces.
description: A large, rectangular building-mounted awning with terracotta roof tiles, black canopies, and outdoor seating areas framed by planters and railings. The structure features fixed metal supports and a beige exterior, suggesting a commercial or hospitality setting.
description_view_0: Front view shows two wide black awnings over a patio with planters, railings, and visible metal supports.
description_view_1: Side view displays a beige wall with a single door and extended awning coverage, with less decorative detail.
description_view_2: Rear view features two smaller awnings, a central blue door or window, and additional planters and railings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a mostly plain black wall with a single window and partial awning coverage.
attribute_mounting_location: attached to the facade and roof of a commercial building, extending over outdoor patio areas
attribute_canopy_pattern: solid black with no visible decorative pattern
attribute_edge_trim_style: straight edge with minimal trim, no scalloping or fringe
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed metal frame with posts and trusses supporting the canopy
